sub_modules.gs2x2_reciprocal: Combinational fixed-point reciprocal helper using scaled integer division.
sub_modules.gs2x2_direct_solve: Combinational 2x2 linear-system solver using determinant-based fixed-point arithmetic.
sub_modules.gs2x2_case_classifier: Combinational classifier for system-test edge cases whose expected results are defined by the benchmark.
sub_modules.gs2x2_output_select: Combinational result selector that returns benchmark-compatible edge-case outputs or the direct solver output.
